full_answer.answer: To resolve this, open Analytics, choose Attribution, then click Download report.
full_answer.question: How do I export attribution reports?
steps: Open Analytics, choose Attribution, then click Download report.
If it still does not work, contact support at https://example.com/support and include the cited ticket details.
